requirement_topic.en: Luminaire Electrical Safety — GSO IEC 60598 (240 V / 50 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 灯具电气安全——GSO IEC 60598（240 V / 50 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 燈具電氣安全——GSO IEC 60598（240 V / 50 Hz）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Qatar market must comply with the GSO-adopted version of the IEC 60598 series (GSO IEC 60598-1 general requirements and the relevant Part 2 sections, e.g. fixed/portable/recessed luminaires). GSO standards are issued by the GCC Standardization Organization and adopted/enforced in Qatar by QGOSM (Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology) under MOCI. Construction, insulation, creepage and clearance, earthing, temperature rise, and protection against electric shock must be evaluated for the Qatar supply of 240 V, 50 Hz. Demonstration of conformity (test reports against the GSO/IEC standard) is required as part of QGOSM conformity for regulated electrical products, with the goods imported through a licensed in-country importer.
summary.zh: 进入卡塔尔市场的 LED 灯具须符合 GSO 采纳的 IEC 60598 系列版本（GSO IEC 60598-1 通用要求及相关第 2 部分章节，如固定式/便携式/嵌入式灯具）。GSO 标准由海湾标准化组织发布，并由隶属 MOCI 的 QGOSM（卡塔尔标准与计量总局）在卡塔尔采纳与执行。须针对卡塔尔 240 V、50 Hz 供电评估结构、绝缘、爬电距离与电气间隙、接地、温升及防触电保护。对受管制电气产品，须在 QGOSM 符合性框架内提交符合性证明（依据 GSO/IEC 标准的检测报告），且货物须经持牌的当地进口商进口。
summary.zht: 進入卡塔爾市場的 LED 燈具須符合 GSO 採納的 IEC 60598 系列版本（GSO IEC 60598-1 通用要求及相關第 2 部分章節，如固定式/便攜式/嵌入式燈具）。GSO 標準由海灣標準化組織發布，並由隸屬 MOCI 的 QGOSM（卡塔爾標準與計量總局）在卡塔爾採納與執行。須針對卡塔爾 240 V、50 Hz 供電評估結構、絕緣、爬電距離與電氣間隙、接地、溫升及防觸電保護。對受管制電氣產品，須在 QGOSM 符合性框架內提交符合性證明（依據 GSO/IEC 標準的檢測報告），且貨物須經持牌的當地進口商進口。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires, Part 1: General requirements and tests (GSO adoption of IEC 60598-1, enforced in Qatar by QGOSM)
GSO IEC 60598-2 series — Luminaires, Part 2: Particular requirements (relevant section for the luminaire type)

summary.en: China's equivalent is the GB 7000 series (GB 7000.1 general requirements for luminaires and the relevant GB 7000.2xx particular requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 60598. For luminaires within the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scope, mandatory third-party certification against GB 7000 is required, administered by CNCA and conducted by bodies such as CQC. Chinese product safety design is referenced to a 220 V, 50 Hz domestic supply.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 7000 系列（GB 7000.1 灯具通用要求及相关 GB 7000.2xx 特殊要求），在技术上与 IEC 60598 一致。对于属于 CCC（中国强制性产品认证）范围的灯具，须依据 GB 7000 进行强制性第三方认证，由 CNCA 管理并由 CQC 等机构实施。中国产品安全设计参照 220 V、50 Hz 的国内供电。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 7000 系列（GB 7000.1 燈具通用要求及相關 GB 7000.2xx 特殊要求），在技術上與 IEC 60598 一致。對於屬於 CCC（中國強制性產品認證）範圍的燈具，須依據 GB 7000 進行強制性第三方認證，由 CNCA 管理並由 CQC 等機構實施。中國產品安全設計參照 220 V、50 Hz 的國內供電。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1 — Luminaires, Part 1: General requirements and tests (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 60598-1)
GB 7000.2xx series — Luminaires, Part 2: Particular requirements
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for in-scope luminaires (CNCA/CQC)

gap.en: Both China (GB 7000) and Qatar (GSO IEC 60598) trace back to IEC 60598, so the underlying technical requirements are closely aligned. The gaps are administrative and electrical-configuration rather than fundamental: (1) Qatar requires conformity demonstrated against the GSO-adopted IEC 60598 standard within QGOSM conformity — a Chinese CCC certificate against GB 7000 is not directly recognised and a separate test report / conformity route is required; (2) Qatar mains is 240 V nominal vs China's 220 V — verify that ratings, insulation coordination, and temperature-rise margins are valid at 240 V (50 Hz is common to both, so frequency-dependent components are unaffected); (3) goods must enter via a licensed Qatar in-country importer; (4) marking and documentation must satisfy QGOSM/GSO requirements rather than CCC marking. Verify the exact edition of the GSO/IEC standard and the specific Part 2 section that applies to the luminaire type.
gap.zh: 中国（GB 7000）与卡塔尔（GSO IEC 60598）均溯源于 IEC 60598，底层技术要求高度一致。差距属于行政与电气配置层面而非根本性差异：（1）卡塔尔要求在 QGOSM 符合性框架内依据 GSO 采纳的 IEC 60598 标准证明符合性——中国依据 GB 7000 的 CCC 证书不被直接认可，须另行提交检测报告/符合性路径；（2）卡塔尔市电标称 240 V，中国为 220 V——须核实额定值、绝缘配合及温升裕度在 240 V 下仍然有效（50 Hz 两地相同，故与频率相关的元件不受影响）；（3）货物须经持牌的卡塔尔当地进口商进口；（4）标识与文件须满足 QGOSM/GSO 要求，而非 CCC 标识。请核实适用于该灯具类型的 GSO/IEC 标准确切版本及具体第 2 部分章节。
gap.zht: 中國（GB 7000）與卡塔爾（GSO IEC 60598）均溯源於 IEC 60598，底層技術要求高度一致。差距屬於行政與電氣配置層面而非根本性差異：（1）卡塔爾要求在 QGOSM 符合性框架內依據 GSO 採納的 IEC 60598 標準證明符合性——中國依據 GB 7000 的 CCC 證書不被直接認可，須另行提交檢測報告/符合性路徑；（2）卡塔爾市電標稱 240 V，中國為 220 V——須核實額定值、絕緣配合及溫升裕度在 240 V 下仍然有效（50 Hz 兩地相同，故與頻率相關的元件不受影響）；（3）貨物須經持牌的卡塔爾當地進口商進口；（4）標識與文件須滿足 QGOSM/GSO 要求，而非 CCC 標識。請核實適用於該燈具類型的 GSO/IEC 標準確切版本及具體第 2 部分章節。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — conformity with GSO-adopted IEC 60598 required for regulated luminaires under QGOSM conformity before Qatar market placement; import through a licensed in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (in scope) — CCC certification against GB 7000 required for in-scope luminaires (CNCA/CQC)

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adopted and enforced in Qatar by QGOSM / MOCI

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires for Qatar must demonstrate electrical-safety conformity against the GSO-adopted IEC 60598 series within QGOSM conformity, not the Chinese GB 7000 / CCC route. Although GB 7000 and GSO IEC 60598 are both IEC-based and technically close, the Chinese certificate is not directly recognised — a separate test report and conformity path are required. Re-rate the product for 240 V (50 Hz unchanged) and route imports through a licensed Qatar importer. Verify the exact GSO/IEC edition and the applicable Part 2 section for the luminaire type.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入卡塔尔的 LED 灯具须在 QGOSM 符合性框架内依据 GSO 采纳的 IEC 60598 系列证明电气安全符合性，而非中国 GB 7000 / CCC 路径。尽管 GB 7000 与 GSO IEC 60598 均基于 IEC 且技术接近，中国证书不被直接认可——须另行提交检测报告及符合性路径。须按 240 V 重新核定产品（50 Hz 不变），并经持牌的卡塔尔进口商办理进口。请核实灯具类型适用的 GSO/IEC 确切版本及第 2 部分章节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入卡塔爾的 LED 燈具須在 QGOSM 符合性框架內依據 GSO 採納的 IEC 60598 系列證明電氣安全符合性，而非中國 GB 7000 / CCC 路徑。儘管 GB 7000 與 GSO IEC 60598 均基於 IEC 且技術接近，中國證書不被直接認可——須另行提交檢測報告及符合性路徑。須按 240 V 重新核定產品（50 Hz 不變），並經持牌的卡塔爾進口商辦理進口。請核實燈具類型適用的 GSO/IEC 確切版本及第 2 部分章節。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp Safety — GSO IEC 62560 vs GB 24906 / GB 16915
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯安全——GSO IEC 62560 与 GB 24906 / GB 16915
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈安全——GSO IEC 62560 與 GB 24906 / GB 16915

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (LED bulbs with integrated control gear) for general lighting in Qatar must comply with the GSO-adopted version of IEC 62560 (safety specifications for self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with voltage > 50 V). The standard covers marking, interchangeability, protection against accidental contact with live parts, insulation resistance and electric strength, mechanical strength, cap temperature rise, resistance to heat/fire/tracking, and fault conditions. Lamps must be rated for the Qatar supply of 240 V, 50 Hz with the appropriate cap type. Conformity is assessed within the QGOSM framework, with import through a licensed in-country importer.
summary.zh: 用于卡塔尔通用照明的自镇流 LED 灯（内置控制装置的 LED 灯泡）须符合 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62560 版本（电压 > 50 V 通用照明自镇流 LED 灯的安全规范）。该标准涵盖标识、互换性、防止意外接触带电部件、绝缘电阻与电气强度、机械强度、灯头温升、耐热/耐火/耐漏电起痕及故障状态。灯具须按卡塔尔 240 V、50 Hz 供电及相应灯头类型进行额定。符合性在 QGOSM 框架内评定，并经持牌的当地进口商进口。
summary.zht: 用於卡塔爾通用照明的自鎮流 LED 燈（內置控制裝置的 LED 燈泡）須符合 GSO 採納的 IEC 62560 版本（電壓 > 50 V 通用照明自鎮流 LED 燈的安全規範）。該標準涵蓋標識、互換性、防止意外接觸帶電部件、絕緣電阻與電氣強度、機械強度、燈頭溫升、耐熱/耐火/耐漏電起痕及故障狀態。燈具須按卡塔爾 240 V、50 Hz 供電及相應燈頭類型進行額定。符合性在 QGOSM 框架內評定，並經持牌的當地進口商進口。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages > 50 V — Safety specifications (GSO adoption of IEC 62560, enforced in Qatar by QGOSM)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 24906 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages > 50 V — Safety requirements), which is aligned with IEC 62560, together with the lamp-cap/holder standards in the GB/IEC 60061 family. For in-scope self-ballasted LED lamps, CCC certification applies. Chinese lamps are designed and marked for a 220 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 24906（普通照明用 50 V 以上自镇流 LED 灯安全要求），与 IEC 62560 一致，并配合 GB/IEC 60061 系列的灯头/灯座标准。对于范围内的自镇流 LED 灯，适用 CCC 认证。中国灯具按 220 V、50 Hz 供电设计与标识。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 24906（普通照明用 50 V 以上自鎮流 LED 燈安全要求），與 IEC 62560 一致，並配合 GB/IEC 60061 系列的燈頭/燈座標準。對於範圍內的自鎮流 LED 燈，適用 CCC 認證。中國燈具按 220 V、50 Hz 供電設計與標識。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting (>50 V) — Safety requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
GB/T 1406 / GB 60061 family — Lamp caps and holders (interchangeability)

gap.en: GB 24906 and GSO IEC 62560 are both IEC 62560-based, so the safety test requirements are closely aligned. The gaps are: (1) Qatar conformity must be shown against the GSO-adopted IEC 62560 within QGOSM — a CCC certificate against GB 24906 is not directly recognised, so a separate test report / conformity route is required; (2) lamps must be rated and marked for 240 V (China 220 V); confirm thermal and electric-strength margins remain valid at the higher nominal voltage (50 Hz unchanged); (3) cap type must match the holders used in the Qatar/GCC market; (4) GSO/QGOSM marking and a licensed in-country importer are required rather than CCC marking. Verify the exact GSO/IEC 62560 edition currently enforced.
gap.zh: GB 24906 与 GSO IEC 62560 均基于 IEC 62560，故安全检测要求高度一致。差距在于：（1）卡塔尔须在 QGOSM 框架内依据 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62560 证明符合性——依据 GB 24906 的 CCC 证书不被直接认可，须另行提交检测报告/符合性路径；（2）灯具须按 240 V 进行额定与标识（中国 220 V）；须确认在更高标称电压下热裕度与电气强度裕度仍然有效（50 Hz 不变）；（3）灯头类型须与卡塔尔/海湾市场所用灯座匹配；（4）须采用 GSO/QGOSM 标识及持牌当地进口商，而非 CCC 标识。请核实当前执行的 GSO/IEC 62560 确切版本。
gap.zht: GB 24906 與 GSO IEC 62560 均基於 IEC 62560，故安全檢測要求高度一致。差距在於：（1）卡塔爾須在 QGOSM 框架內依據 GSO 採納的 IEC 62560 證明符合性——依據 GB 24906 的 CCC 證書不被直接認可，須另行提交檢測報告/符合性路徑；（2）燈具須按 240 V 進行額定與標識（中國 220 V）；須確認在更高標稱電壓下熱裕度與電氣強度裕度仍然有效（50 Hz 不變）；（3）燈頭類型須與卡塔爾/海灣市場所用燈座匹配；（4）須採用 GSO/QGOSM 標識及持牌當地進口商，而非 CCC 標識。請核實當前執行的 GSO/IEC 62560 確切版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — conformity with GSO-adopted IEC 62560 required for self-ballasted LED lamps under QGOSM conformity before Qatar market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (in scope) — CCC certification against GB 24906 required for in-scope self-ballasted LED lamps (CNCA/CQC)

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adopted and enforced in Qatar by QGOSM / MOCI

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps for Qatar must demonstrate safety conformity against the GSO-adopted IEC 62560 within QGOSM, not the Chinese GB 24906 / CCC route. The standards are IEC-based and technically close, but the Chinese certificate is not directly recognised — a separate test report and conformity path are required. Re-rate and re-mark the lamp for 240 V (50 Hz unchanged), confirm cap compatibility, and route imports through a licensed Qatar importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入卡塔尔的自镇流 LED 灯须在 QGOSM 框架内依据 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62560 证明安全符合性，而非中国 GB 24906 / CCC 路径。两者均基于 IEC 且技术接近，但中国证书不被直接认可——须另行提交检测报告及符合性路径。须按 240 V 重新核定与标识灯具（50 Hz 不变），确认灯头兼容性，并经持牌的卡塔尔进口商办理进口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入卡塔爾的自鎮流 LED 燈須在 QGOSM 框架內依據 GSO 採納的 IEC 62560 證明安全符合性，而非中國 GB 24906 / CCC 路徑。兩者均基於 IEC 且技術接近，但中國證書不被直接認可——須另行提交檢測報告及符合性路徑。須按 240 V 重新核定與標識燈具（50 Hz 不變），確認燈頭兼容性，並經持牌的卡塔爾進口商辦理進口。
